goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '2 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'nandos city centre'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for 'the same group of people' at '17:00' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 5 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called nandos city centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
